title: BugStamped payload
description: Emitted when a bug's commit_sha is set via bug_stamp_sha. Distinct from BugResolved(kind="fixed", commit_sha=...) because bug_stamp_sha is a separate action used when a fix lands AFTER a bug was resolved (e.g., resolve at decision time with the resolution note, stamp later when the commit lands). Distinct from BugEdited(updated_fields=["commit_sha"]) so readers can filter for SHA stamps without parsing field-name arrays — bug_stamp_sha is its own MCP action and gets its own event type.

commit_sha.description: The commit that lands the fix, or the literal sentinel 'unversioned' for fixes whose artifacts live outside any git repo (user-level scripts, vault docs) per mcp__toolkit-server__work convention.
